ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Hearing On Filing Of Executed Copies Of The Joinder Agreement And Other Documents To Establish The Sub-Account And The Trustee'S Bond
Off Calendar Jul-11-2023 Continued To Jul-25-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Bryan Beard appeared by zoom for Legacy Enhancement (trustee).

The court stated that it is looking for a bond. Mr. Beard stated that they followed up with the bonding company, and that they made the premium payment and were told that they will be posting the bond. The status hearing is continued to July 25, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for proof of bond.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Pliego. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Hearing On Filing Of Executed Copies Of The Joinder Agreement And Other Documents To Establish The Sub-Account And The Trustee'S Bond
Off Calendar Jun-27-2023 Continued To Jul-11-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Bryan Beard, Esq., counsel for Legacy Enhancement, Trustee (appearing by video conference).

The Court queries counsel as to the status of the bond. Mr. Beard reports that he submitted the application to the surety on or about June 15, 2023 but has not yet received a response from them. He will contact them directly after this hearing.

After brief discussion, the Court continues the hearing to July 11, 2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Gomez. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)

Petition For Order Directing Establishment Of Pooled Minor'S Trust; Authorization Of Trustee'S Fees; And Approving Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar May-23-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance: Bryan Beard appearing via zoom for Miles Tarver (Petitioner).

Mr. Beard acknowledges the Court's correction to the attorney's fees. Petition for order directing establishment of Pooled minor's trust is taken under submission with the intent to grant and to allow up to 1.95% of the sub-account balance as the trustee's fees on account under Probate Code 2643, subject to the Court's review and approval at the time of each accounting.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

Petition For Order Directing Establishment Of Pooled Minor'S Trust; Authorization Of Trustee'S Fees; And Approving Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Mar-21-2023 Continued To May-23-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances; Bryan Beard appearing via zoom for Petitioner Miles Tarver.

Mr. Beard reported Civil Attorney is in the process of having the minors compromise order corrected, that the petition submitted clearly called for a minors trust and not a special need trust and requested a three-to-four-month continuance. Mr. Beard also stated he believes the $50,000 is with the Civil Attorney in the client/trust account. The Court raised the issue of perhaps filing a Petition in Department 514 to have the order corrected. The petition for Order Directing Establishment of Pooled Minor's Trust, etc., is continued to May 23, 2023, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of the amended order.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: E. Pliego. Not reported.
